title: Contact – Christian Wakeford MP
text_excerpt: Contact – Christian Wakeford MP Christian Wakeford MP Home Contact You can contact me in the following ways: Email : christian.wakeford.mp@parliament.uk Telephone : 0161 533 0801 In person or by post : 11 Deansgate, Radcliffe, M26 2SH Calls to my office may be recorded for training and monitoring purposes. Abusive language and behaviour will not be tolerated. When contacting me, please ensure that you have given your full name and postal address . I am only able to respond to queries by constituents of Bury South. Owing to the very large number of emails, letters and phone calls I receive each day, I prioritise constituents with urgent cases, and personalised emails and letters. All other queries will be responded to as soon as possible. Correspondence received to my Westminster office is not regularly monitored. You are more likely to receive a prompt response by contacting my constituency office using the above details. Christian Wakeford MP 0161 533 0801 christian.wakeford.mp@parliament.uk 11 Deansgate, Radcliffe, Manchester, M26 2SH Social media Facebook X Instagram
